Lyrics.text:
1. Mpivahiny! mba lazao:
Zovy moa hianao?"
"Izaho namanao ity,
Fa miandry Ilay ary."
"Mpivahiny! mba lazao:
Iza no andrasanao?"
"Jeso, Havako ary,
No andrasako aty."
2. Mpivahiny! mba lazao:
Aiza no halehanao?"
"Lalana ety avokoa
Sady sarotra tokoa."
Mpivahiny!mba lazao:
Iza no hirahinao?"
"Jeso,Zoky be fitia,
Tsy mamela mba hania."
3. "Mpivahiny! mba lazao:
Aiza no hodiovinao?"
"Ao an-danitra madio
No aleha ankehitrio."
"Mpivahiny! mba lazao:
Iza no handray anao?"
"Jeso, Ilay Mpanjaka soa,
Tompo, Havako tokoa."
